race.description: Tab Cup Carnival $20,000 Trainers Bonus Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: TEN CARAT LUCY (10) deserves a win. Has never missed the frame in seven starts here, and has placed 3/3 course and distance. Since winning on debut has racked up six straight minors. Leading rider back aboard who did win on her on debut and looks hard to beat again. ITZA MOTZA (11) settled well back last start and made little impact in the straight when seventh over this journey at Kilcoy. Best figures measure up nicely. Drops in weight and should play a big role. UNDERRATED (4) resumed two weeks ago over 1050m at this track and was only beaten 1.2 lengths into fourth. Has never missed the placings at the second run back. Fitter this time. Hard to beat in this suitable race. HE'S THE ONE (3) hasn't been far away and is among the main chances. MOISSANITE (7) is overdue and is worth some thought again.
